creator: joeb1@a1poweruser.com
text:
For the archive;

This thread really explains in detail what is happening with PF and why the
Openbsd
version is no longer being ported to FreeBSD.

IE: Flame between original porter of OpenBSD PF version 4.5 and
the author of the new rewritten FreeBSD version of PF.

http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-pf/2012-September/006740.html
